character_buff.name: Artilleria
character_buff.description: Recalling the ballistics knowledge acquired during military service, you prepare for battle.

effects: Effect changes depending on the active stance
[Ballistics - Siege]
10% chance to reset cooldown upon [Counterweight] cancellation
D.R. +1, DEF +10, Immunity +5, All Incoming Damage -5%
[Ballistics - Bombardment]
1% chance to increase casters [Chamber Overheat] by 1 level on normal attack
A.R. +1, ATK +40%, Physical Penetration +20, Movement Speed +20%, Speed Cap +2.00
Grants [Chamber Overheat] Lv. +20

stances.name: Culverin

skills.name: Direct Shot
skills.description: Fires a projectile in a straight line forward to restrain enemies.

Grants the caster [Counterweight] +1 level (up to level 4) when used on an enemy
Specialized in damage against structures

skills.name: Cloud Sweeper
skills.description: Fires anti-aircraft shells into the sky to neutralize airborne enemies.

Skill damage increases up to 2x with more targets hit
